рџ”„ **Ralph activated.** Scanning the board now...Now I have the full picture. Here's the board:

```
рџ”„ Ralph вЂ” Work Monitor (Round 1)
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Љ Board Status:
  вњ… Untriaged:     0 (all 18 issues triaged & assigned to @copilot)
  рџ“‹ In Progress:  18 issues with draft PRs from copilot-swe-agent
  рџ”ґ CI Failure:    1 вЂ” PR #63 (PDF viewer panel) вЂ” CodeQL FAILURE
  рџџў Non-draft PRs: 2 вЂ” PR #72 (Solr search, CI green), PR #28 (security dep bump)
  вЏі Awaiting review: All draft PRs (no reviews yet)

Phase breakdown:
  Phase 2 (v0.4.0): 6 issues, 6 draft PRs вЂ” #54,60,61,62,63,64
  Phase 3 (v0.5.0): 6 issues, 6 draft PRs вЂ” #65,66,67,68,69,70
  Phase 4 (v0.6.0): 6 issues, 6 draft PRs вЂ” #55,56,57,58,59,71

Next action: Investigating CI failure on PR #63
```

Acting on highest priority вЂ” **CI failure on PR #63**. Spawning agent to investigate.Found it. PR #63 has **2 high-severity CodeQL alerts** вЂ” path traversal in `qdrant-search/main.py` lines 254 & 256. The code has a `commonpath` guard but CodeQL doesn't recognize it as sufficient sanitization.

Let me fix this. Checking out the branch and patching the vulnerability.Good вЂ” Python 3.11, so `pathlib.Path.is_relative_to()` is available. Let me fix the path traversal using `pathlib` which CodeQL handles better:Good. The fix:
1. **Early rejects** `..` segments and absolute paths before any filesystem access
2. Uses `pathlib.Path.resolve()` + `is_relative_to()` which CodeQL tracks better
3. Maintains the same security behaviorвњ… **CI fix pushed to PR #63.** Now returning to the original branch and continuing the scan.Good. Now **Round 2** вЂ” scanning again for remaining work.All 18 issues triaged. CI fix pushed. Let me check if any PRs are ready to merge or need review routing.```
рџ”„ Ralph вЂ” Work Monitor (Round 2 complete)
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

  вЏі Awaiting Review: 23 PRs total
     вЂў 18 draft PRs from copilot-swe-agent (all CI green, mergeable)
     вЂў PR #72 вЂ” Phase 2 Solr search (jmservera, CI green, ready)
     вЂў PRs #25-28 вЂ” dependabot security bumps (no reviews)
  рџџў Approved:       0

вњ… Actions taken this session:
  вЂў Fixed 2 high-severity CodeQL alerts on PR #63
    (path traversal in qdrant-search/main.py в†’ pathlib sanitization)

рџ“‹ Board is blocked on reviews вЂ” no more autonomous work available.
   Ralph is idling. Say "Ralph, go" to rescan.

рџ’Ў Suggestion: The 18 draft PRs and PR #72 need code review.
   Consider reviewing Phase 2 PRs first (#54, #60-64, #72)
   since they're the lowest release milestone (v0.4.0).
